summary: Linear is a project management tool that helps teams organize and prioritize their work, and the get_latest_tickets API endpoint retrieves the most recent tickets from Linear.

steps.title: Create a Linear Account and API Key
steps.description: Log in to linear.app, go to Settings > API Keys, and click Create API Key to generate a new API key.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see the API Keys settings page with a list of existing keys and a button to create a new one.
steps.expected_result: You have created a new Linear API key and have its value ready to use.

test_command: curl -X GET https://api.linear.app/graphql -H 'Authorization: Bearer $LINEAR_API_KEY' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "query { issues(limit: 10, sortBy: { direction: DESC, field: CREATED_AT }) { id, title } }"}'

common_errors.fix: Your API key is invalid or has been revoked. Generate a new one from the API Keys settings page.
Your API key does not have the required permissions. Ensure it has the necessary access rights.

pricing_info: Linear offers a free plan with limited features, as well as several paid plans starting at $15/user/month.
